prompt: Create a cinematic high-angle street fashion portrait of a confident young woman standing on textured urban stone pavement at golden hour, looking directly upward toward the camera with a bold, fearless posture. The camera is nearly overhead, vertical portrait framing, showing her from head to shoes with strong diagonal shadows stretching across the sidewalk and a dark curb or railing edge in the upper background. Her face is intentionally anonymized by a soft rectangular blur over the facial features while her dark wavy hair is pulled back loosely with strands falling around the face. She wears exactly 5 visible fashion/accessory elements: a fitted black ribbed short-sleeve crop top, oversized black cargo pants with large side pockets and drawstring waist, clean white sneakers, a delicate silver pendant necklace, and a slim bracelet on one wrist. Her hands are tucked into her pants pockets, shoulders squared, stance relaxed but powerful. Use realistic photography, warm directional sunlight, deep shadows, natural skin tones, crisp fabric texture, detailed pavement slabs, shallow cinematic contrast, 35mm editorial fashion look, no text, no watermark.
